content.query:
OrcaAlerts_CL 
| extend alert_id_s = iff(isnotempty(column_ifexists('alert_id_s', '')), column_ifexists('alert_id_s', ''), column_ifexists('alert_id', '')) 
| extend time_t = coalesce(column_ifexists('time_t', datetime(null)), TimeGenerated) 
| summarize count(alert_id_s) by time_t

OrcaAlerts_CL 
| extend alert_id_s = iff(isnotempty(column_ifexists('alert_id_s', '')), column_ifexists('alert_id_s', ''), column_ifexists('alert_id', '')) 
| extend asset_type_s = iff(isnotempty(column_ifexists('asset_type_s', '')), column_ifexists('asset_type_s', ''), column_ifexists('asset_type', '')) 
| summarize count(alert_id_s) by asset_type_s

OrcaAlerts_CL 
| extend alert_id_s = iff(isnotempty(column_ifexists('alert_id_s', '')), column_ifexists('alert_id_s', ''), column_ifexists('alert_id', '')) 
| extend alert_type_s = iff(isnotempty(column_ifexists('alert_type_s', '')), column_ifexists('alert_type_s', ''), column_ifexists('alert_type', '')) 
| summarize count(alert_id_s) by alert_type_s

OrcaAlerts_CL 
| extend score_d = coalesce(column_ifexists('score_d', real(null)), column_ifexists('orca_score', real(null))) 
| summarize count() by tostring(score_d)
